title: Cancer Patients with Oral Thrush: 8 Herbal Teas for Relief
description: Glycyrrhiza glabra teas have been traditionally used to help manage oral thrush, a fungal infection caused by an overgrowth of Candida in the mouth. The tea's anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties, particularly from its constituents glycyrrhizin and flavonoids, help to reduce the symptoms and kill the fungal cells. Glycyrrhizin, the main active compound, has been shown to inhibit the growth of Candida and other fungi, thereby preventing the infection from spreading. Flavonoids, o...
